basics.name: Liz Darnell
basics.summary: Research area: trust of generative Al tools in the workplace using mixed methods

work.name: Workday, Inc.
work.summary: Wrote a short literature review connecting the trust of organisations to trust of technology; Partnered with Al experience team to iterate on user studies to evaluate impact of accuracy of generative Al tools on trust; Explored user data related to use of generative AI tools to help drive insights and action by the team

work.name: EGD Consulting, Inc.
work.summary: Analysed voter file and consumer data to facilitate better understanding of target audiences and assist with resource allocation decisions; Provided strategic guidance on implementation of political campaign tactics and community organizing tactics for application in public health campaigns; Conducted applied research for organizations through literature reviews, user interviews, and vendor interviews

work.name: Deck Technologies
work.summary: Provided technical support of complex client usage through SQL support and documentation, shared Slack channels, and group trainings; Managed research and consulting projects internally and externally; Expanded and maintained comprehensive, public technical documentation for Deck's licensable data, ensuring easy access and understanding for current and potential users

work.name: Deck Technologies
work.summary: Led app redesign and improvement through mixed-methods user research; Developed a highly utilized training portal for the product, garnering over 1,500 visits in a year; Enhanced informal data analysis and decision-making processes by implementing well-structured spreadsheets and SQL queries, leading to improved efficiency and insights about app usage

work.name: Montana Democratic Party
work.summary: Developed custom linear regression models based on historic election results to guide resource allocation; Managed and maintained large amounts of sensitive data through a CRM to improve both data quality and usability for end users; Championed and introduced basic security guidelines for the organization, smaller partner organizations and volunteers

courses: Thesis topic: Exploration of the relationship between personal values and climate action or intent to act in Europe using fixed effects and the European Social Survey
